summary: #84835 remains the live canonical issue. It is not a duplicate-close candidate because current main still only logs delayed fetch timeout drift and the issue has protected maintainer/product-decision signals plus a linked implementation PR. #84836 is hydrated as an open security-sensitive PR and should be routed to central security handling only. actions.reason: The canonical issue is open and has unique remaining work plus protected maintainer/product-decision signals; it should stay open for maintainer review rather than be closed or converted into an automated fix path.
The exact linked PR has a security-sensitive signal and must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; this does not change the non-security classification of #84835.
